title: Vanilla Emissive
description: Adds Optifine Emissive Textures to Vanilla Textures.
body:
![A small mineshaft filled to the brim with small emissive details everywhere!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ceab2608773ce9e543b0e21cc0f4420c0fbed60.jpeg)
# Vanilla Emissive
\
*‎*
### Why?
This is just a resource pack I made being annoyed by the fact that the vanilla resource pack is missing emissive textures in a lot of places I feel like should have them.

### Dependencies
Either you can use Optifine, as this resource pack after all uses Optifine's format for emissive textures. However, note that I have not tested it with Optifine and have used it according to the dependencies listed on the versions page.

### License notes
The MIT license only applies to the modifications themselves of Vanilla Minecraft. This is heavily based on Vanilla Minecraft Texture owned by Microsoft. Where the line is drawn between modification, and original creation is unclear legally and I would advise against using any of the files outside of Minecraft.
